title: EMERGENCY SERVICES - 211info
text: COMMUNITY ACTION RESOURCE ENTERPRISES INC EMERGENCY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with utility bills, one-time rent payments, and prescriptions. May have personal items such as clothes, hygiene products, diapers, and pet supplies, depending on donations received. 2310 1st Street Suite 2 Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 842-5261 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 842-5261 Main phone Main phone (503) 842-5261 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: Varies by program DOCUMENTS: Varies by program LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Diapers Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance General Clothing Provision Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Personal/Grooming Supplies Pet Care Supplies Prescription Expense Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - ANCHOR SHELTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY ACTION RESOURCE ENTERPRISES INC
